{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = šļēÁĒįÁ•ěÁ§ĺ (ś≤ľśī•Śłā)

{{nihongo|'''Ita Shrine'''|šļēÁĒįÁ•ěÁ§ĺ (ś≤ľśī•Śłā)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki JinmyŇćchŇć]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|ŚľŹŚÖßÁ§ĺ|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai ShŇćsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|ŚľŹŚÜÖŚįŹÁ§ĺ|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|ō¨ŔäŔÜō¨ōß|arz|ō∂ōĪŔäō≠ ōīŔÜō™Ŕą|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Ň†intoistick√° svatynńõ|da|Shinto-tempel|de|ShintŇć-Schrein|el|ő£őĻőĹŌĄőŅŌäŌÉŌĄőĻőļŌĆ őôőĶŌĀŌĆ|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ňúintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|ŔÖōĻō®ōĮ ōīŘĆŔÜō™ŔąŘĆŘĆ|fi|Ň†intolainen pyh√§kk√∂|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|ŗ§∂ŗ§Ņŗ§āŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§į|hr|Ň†intoistińćki hram|hu|Sint√≥ szent√©ly|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|Á•ěÁ§ĺ|ka|ŠÉęŠÉėŠÉúŠÉęŠÉėŠÉź|ko|žč†žā¨ (žč†ŪÜ†)|lb|ShintŇć-Schr√§in|mr|ŗ§∂ŗ§Ņŗ§āŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§į|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ŗ¨úŗ¨Ņŗ¨ěŗ≠ćŗ¨úŗ¨ĺ|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xinto√≠sta|ru|–Ē–∑–ł–Ĺ–ī–∑—Ź|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Ň†intoistińćno svetiŇ°ńće|sr|–®–ł–Ĺ—ā–ĺ–ł—Ā—ā–ł—á–ļ–ł —Ö—Ä–į–ľ|sv|Jinja|th|ŗł®ŗł≤ŗł•ŗĻÄŗłąŗĻČŗł≤ŗłäŗłīŗłôŗĻāŗłē|tr|Ňěinto tapńĪnańüńĪ|uk|–°–≤—Ź—ā–ł–Ľ–ł—Č–Ķ (—Ā–ł–Ĺ—ā–ĺ)|vi|ThŠļßn x√£|wuu|Á•ěÁ§ĺ|zh_yue|Á•ěÁ§ĺ|zh|Á•ěÁ§ĺ|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== Japanese content ==

|ŚźćÁßį   = Ita Shrine

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|59|56.9|N|138|47|2.6|E}}}}
|śČÄŚú®Śúį = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Numazu|Q241037|qid=Q241037|1=Numazu}} Ida 1

|Á§ĺś†ľ   = former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}
|ŚČĶŚĽļ   = 
|śú¨śģŅ   =

{{coord2|34|59|56.9|N|138|47|2.6|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Ita Shrine''' („ĀĄ„Āü„Āė„āď„Āė„āÉ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Ida, {{ill|lt=Numazu|Q241037|qid=Q241037|1=Numazu}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402127 šļēÁĒįÁ•ěÁ§ĺ] - ťĚôŚ≤°ÁúĆÁ•ěÁ§ĺŚļĀ</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It stands in the eastern inland part of the Ida district, between {{ill|lt=ŇĆsezaki|Q11437688|qid=Q11437688|1=Cape Ose}} and the Heda district / {{ill|lt=Mihama Cape|Q11489198|qid=Q11489198|1=Cape Mihama}}.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the Shikinaisha of the same name, '''Ita Shrine''' („ĀĄ„Āü„Āė„āď„Āė„āÉ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni ShinkaichŇć|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni ShinkaichŇć}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ita no MyŇćjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/ita_title.htm šļēÁĒįÁ•ěÁ§ĺ] - ÁéĄśĚĺŚ≠ź</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140305-01.html šļēÁĒįÁ•ěÁ§ĺ] - ŚĽ∂ŚĖúŚľŹÁ•ěÁ§ĺ„ĀģŤ™ŅśüĽ</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was listed as a village shrine<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|lt=ŇĆkuninushi|Q702140|qid=Q702140|lt=ŇĆkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=ŇĆkuninushi-no-Mikoto}}
